creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
at some point, error reports like these from live system builds are going to be marked as invalid.

ghostscript9-nox11 builds fine, across all platforms:
http://portsmon.freebsd.org/portoverview.py?category=print&portname=ghostscript9-nox11

This is most likely a case where a dependency wasn't updated and would have been if built in, say, poudriere.

I think the PR is invalid, but I'll assign it to the maintainer anyway.
